title: Truework Order
description: Schema for the Truework verification order resource (API version 2023-10-30). An order groups one or more verification requests created via /orders/target-employer, /orders/employer-search, /orders/truework-direct, or /orders/reverification.

Order.description: A Truework verification order returned by POST /orders/* and GET /orders/{order_id}.

verification_requests.description: Verification requests grouped under this order.

permissible_purpose.description: FCRA permissible purpose under which the verification is being run.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the order was created.

VerificationRequest.description: A single verification request inside an order. One order can hold multiple verification requests routed through different methods.

type.description: Verification type — VOE (employment), VOI (income), or VOIE (both).

method.description: Verification method used to fulfill this request.

report_id.description: Identifier of the resulting verification report (when complete).

Target.description: Subject of the verification — typically the borrower/applicant.

Employer.description: Employer the subject is being verified against.

company_id.description: Identifier from the Truework employer database.

RequestConfig.description: Per-order configuration controlling which verification methods Truework may orchestrate.
